span.p: ③ Pad to a square K×K cost matrix

div.style: color: rgb(15, 23, 42) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
K = max(#participants, #beds)
real cell = soft penalty
forbidden = ∞ (hard constraint)
dummy row → empty bed
dummy col → waitlisted
